name: sellersheet-skills
description: Production-ready agent skills for Amazon sellers using SellerSheet — Google Sheets I/O and multi-tab operator dashboards. More skills coming after review.

plugins.name: sellersheet-sheets
plugins.description: Google Sheets I/O via SellerSheet MCP — reads, writes, formats, builds reports/dashboards/financial models with brand palette, live SQL() spill, image-thumbnail patterns. Self-contained — no xlsx skill required.

plugins.name: sellersheet-dashboard
plugins.description: Multi-tab operator dashboards with freshness instrumentation, agent insights, status tabs. Covers inventory, PPC, account health, listings, profit/margin, returns, buy box, cash conversion. Builds on sellersheet-sheets.
